did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Pamphlet by Eugene D. Montillon: "Historic Architecture in Broome County, N.Y. and Vicinity."

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1912. Professor of landscape architecture, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Pamphlet by Eugene D. Montillon: "Historic Architecture in Broome County, N.Y. and Vicinity."

did.unittitle: "Historic Architecture in Broome County, N.Y. and Vicinity."
